basics.name: Matias Fuentes Becerra
basics.label: Economist & MSc student in Economics, Universidad de Chile
basics.summary: Economist and MSc student in Economics at the Universidad de Chile, with applied research experience in experimental economics, microeconomics, and public opinion, focused on quantitative methods and the use of large language models (LLMs) for social research. Project Research Analyst at the Centre for Experimental Social Sciences (CESS, Nuffield College/USACH) and on Talking to Machines (Nuffield College, Oxford).
